Experience.Name: Mod_trib_experience_gong1
Experience.Desc:
You accidentally inherited the Lightning Transcendence Law before joining the Taiyi Sect, which leaves you afraid of drawing too much attention as a result. 


[size=10]Unlock Law: [color=#D06508]Lightning Transcendence Law[/color]
The start of this Law can be difficult. Not recommended for first-time players.[/size]

Experience.Name: Mod_bl_experience_gong1
Experience.Desc:
You inherited the forbidden Black Lightning Dao from a dying immortal who defied heaven itself. The void's power now courses through your veins.


[size=10]Unlock Law: [color=#D06508]Black Lightning Dao[/color]
An overwhelmingly powerful Law. Recommended for those who wish to dominate.[/size]

Experience.Name: Mod_trib_experience_elemresistpills
Experience.Desc: A hidden stash of powerful elemental pills and rare essences. Enough to resist any element.

Experience.Name: Mod_trib_experience_innerqipills
Experience.Desc: A vast collection of Inner Cauldron pills and rare cultivation materials.

Experience.Name: Mod_trib_experience_condensedtribulationpill
Experience.Desc: The ultimate cultivation pills forged from tribulation lightning itself.

Experience.Name: Mod_trib_experience_demonblood
Experience.Desc: A dark collection of demonic pills, combat elixirs, and forbidden knowledge.

Experience.Name: Mod_trib_experience_ancestralyaoguaibody
Experience.Desc:
The dying Taiyi Sect elder was proficient in all kinds of ancient legacies. Thus upon seeing you waken up a intelligent beast, the elder included the contents of Ancestral Yaoguai Body among the memories that were passed on to you, which is an ancient Law of body refinement.


[size=10]Unlock Law: [color=#D06508]Ancestral Yaoguai Body[/color]
This Law is extremely hard in early stages, not recommended for beginners.[/size]
